chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 30 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For bail before arrest 1. For orders on CMA No.126/2020 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of bail before arrest 14.01.2020 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through this Constitution Petition, petitioner Nadeem son of Sono Khan Shaikh seeks protective bail in the Execution Application No.65/2012 pending before learned Banking Court-II, Sukkur Division, Sukkur. Counsel for the petitioner submits that warrant of arrest has been issued by the learned Banking Court against the petitioner without hearing, and he apprehends his arrest. In support of such submissions, counsel for the petitioner has placed on record copy of order dated 19.01.2016 passed by this Court in Criminal Bail Application No. D-40/2016. Counsel for the petitioner, along with his statement, has also filed certified copy of the Application under Section 19 of the Financial Institutions (Recovery of Finances) Ordinance, 2001. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the petitioner for a period of four days subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of NBWs is suspended for a period of four days. Petitioner is directed to surrender before the Executing Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of four days or whenever he surrenders before the Executing Court, which one occurs earlier. In case, the petitioner fails to surrender before the Executing Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of four days or whenever he surrenders before the Executing Court, which one occurs earlier. In case, the petitioner fails to surrender before the Executing Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Petition stands disposed of along with the listed application in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
